name: Velvet Pour
description: Velvet Pour is a modern, sophisticated café and bakery website template built with Next.js 15 and Tailwind CSS. It features a stunning, responsive design with smooth animations, a detailed menu section, and a built-in reservation system. Perfect for coffee shops, patisseries, and bistros looking to enhance their online presence.

name: Elixir Cafe
description: Crafted for cafes, and food businesses. Features a stunning hero with parallax menu sections, online reservation form, chef spotlight, and a full gallery. Optimized for local SEO with schema markup for cafes.

name: ELYRA HOTELS
description: A conversion-focused landing page for hotels, resorts, and hospitality businesses. Features an immersive hero with booking widget, room showcases with galleries, guest reviews, local attractions guide, and a seamless reservation flow. Optimized for travel SEO with schema markup for hotels.

name: FlexiZen
description: A minimal, elegant  template for yoga trainers, gyms,and wellness centres. Features smooth page transitions, project case studies with detailed layouts, a filterable work grid, and a blog for thought leadership.

name: Web Design Agency
description: Designed for digital agencies, and creative professionals. Features doctor profiles, appointment booking, service descriptions, patient testimonials, and health blog. HIPAA-friendly design patterns with accessibility in mind.
